Subject: A tiny baby
Event: A tiny baby giggles excitedly for the first time as gentle acoustic guitar melodies fill the room, sparking a delightful discovery of music’s magic.
story_prompts: The same A tiny baby lies on a soft blanket, eyes wide with curiosity, reaching tiny hands toward a warmly lit cozy room filled with gentle sunlight streaming through a window draped with light curtains.
The same A tiny baby sits up, smiling as the first soft string sounds of an acoustic guitar gently resonate nearby, wooden floor and scattered soft toys framing a bright, inviting nursery corner.

The same A tiny baby giggles joyously, arms raised toward a nearby acoustic guitar cradled by a sitting figure, surrounded by colorful musical notes whimsically floating in the air against a softly painted wall.

The same A tiny baby claps excitedly, captivated by the surrounding room now alive with swirling musical notes and warm golden light, the acoustic guitar resting on a plush rug beside a small stack of children’s books.
